headline: Cleanest beat-and-raise of the day — every box checked. Customer concentration improved, backlog +87%, Video divestiture cash imminent.
realStoryHeadlines: Customer diversification thesis working — Top-2 concentration fell 67%→58% YoY; Rest-of-Market bookings now >50% of total
Backlog $582M with 60% converting in 12mo = ~72% of FY26 guide already visible
cOS™ adoption: 150 customers serving 45.7M cable modems; DOCSIS 4.0 + fiber wins compounding
Video divestiture on track: $145M cash to MediaKind, Q2 close → ~$146M net cash post-deal
Q1 buyback continues — 4.2M shares ($43M); $122M of $200M auth complete

frameworkOverride.rationale: Screener TTM growth shows −25% from Video divestiture mechanically depressing trailing comp. On continuing ops alone: +43% YoY growth, 15.4% Non-GAAP net margin, $30M Q1 FCF.

tradingRead.earningsRule: Triggered today — structures across print correctly capped LOW conf. Restate for Q2 print (~August).
tradingRead.postPrintIV: IV crush expected. Real beat-and-raise underneath. CSP at $9-10 attractive tactically but chain liquidity thin.
tradingRead.longThesisGate: Stock up ~108% YoY into print — much of the beat may already be priced. Q2 guide $115-125M is sequentially below Q1 $121.7M.
tradingRead.bottomLine: Cleanest of the May 11 cohort by a wide margin. Multi-quarter fundamental tailwind: customer diversification + backlog + divestiture cash + buybacks. Framework override justified.
